templates.title: Artist Studio Process
templates.description: Intimate documentation of paint mixing, brushwork, and creative decisions in an artist's studio

prompt.main: Artist studio process documentation, intimate creative workspace, natural north-facing window light, close-up paint mixing on palette, brush touching canvas texture, time-lapse painting progression, over-shoulder perspective of creative decisions, stepping back to evaluate progress, 4K cinematic quality, shallow depth of field

elements.opening: Wide establishing shot of sunlit studio space, artist's hands preparing materials, slow pan across art supplies and tools, dust particles floating in morning light
elements.main_sequence: Medium shot contemplating blank canvas, extreme close-up brush touching canvas, rhythmic alternation between real-time detail work and time-lapse progression, macro shots of paint mixing and texture creation
elements.closing: Pull-back reveal of completed artwork, artist's satisfied expression, final detail shot of signature being added
elements.atmosphere: Quiet contemplation, creative intensity, authentic artistic process

technical_details.lighting: Natural window light with warm practicals for evening scenes
technical_details.audio: Brush strokes, palette knife scraping, canvas texture, minimalist piano

templates.title: Digital Art Creation
templates.description: Dynamic capture of tablet drawing, layer building, and digital techniques from blank canvas to finished piece

prompt.main: Digital art creation time-lapse, screen recording with artist hands visible, stylus work close-ups on tablet surface, layer building progression, vibrant color development, UI elements and tool selection, 4K 60fps quality, modern tech-creative atmosphere, calibrated monitor glow

elements.opening: Artist setting up digital workspace, screen coming to life, UI elements and tool selection reveal
elements.main_sequence: Screen recording of artwork progression, intercut shots of artist's hand on stylus, close-ups of intricate detail work, layer building and color development, special effects and finishing touches
elements.closing: Final artwork reveal, export and display on various devices, artist's signature or watermark application
elements.atmosphere: Tech-creative fusion, modern digital studio environment

technical_details.lighting: Calibrated monitor glow with ambient bias lighting
technical_details.audio: Stylus taps, keyboard shortcuts, electronic/synthwave music

templates.title: Sculpture Making Journey
templates.description: Detailed documentation of clay modeling, carving, and casting process from raw materials to finished sculpture

prompt.main: Sculpture creation process, raw clay transformation, detailed tool work with chisels and modeling tools, 360-degree rotation shots of progress, dust particles in directional light beams, time-lapse and real-time mix, 4K cinematic quality, industrial workshop atmosphere

elements.opening: Raw materials display - clay blocks, sculptor's tools laid out, artist's hands examining material texture
elements.main_sequence: Initial shaping and rough form creation, close-ups of carving techniques, 360-degree dolly around sculpture, detail work with specialized tools, artist's focused expressions, dust and clay particles in motion
elements.closing: Final finishing touches, complete sculpture from multiple angles, dramatic lighting reveal of finished piece

technical_details.lighting: Directional workshop lighting with raking light for texture
technical_details.audio: Chiseling, sanding, clay squishing, rhythmic ambient music

templates.title: Street Art Documentation
templates.description: Dynamic capture of spray painting, stenciling, and urban canvas transformation

prompt.main: Street art creation in urban setting, dynamic spray painting action, close-up nozzle work with paint mist, wide-angle wall progress shots, vibrant colors against concrete texture, artist full-body movement, 4K handheld energy, authentic street atmosphere, natural daylight

elements.opening: Urban location establishment, blank wall surface, artist arriving with spray cans and supplies
elements.main_sequence: Sketching phase, spray can techniques close-ups, wide shots showing scale, paint drips and texture details, time-lapse color fills, real-time precision work, environmental context with passersby
elements.closing: Final details and signature tag, step back reveal of completed mural, artist with finished piece, community reactions
elements.atmosphere: Urban energy, creative rebellion, public art transformation

technical_details.audio: Spray can shaking and hissing, urban soundscape, hip-hop beats

templates.title: Photography Shoot Behind Scenes
templates.description: Professional photo shoot documentation showcasing lighting setup, composition choices, and creative direction

prompt.main: Photography shoot behind-the-scenes, professional studio setup, lighting adjustment details, photographer directing model, camera settings adjustments, tethered shooting monitor views, creative decision moments, 4K documentary style, professional atmosphere

elements.opening: Empty studio transformation, lighting equipment setup, photographer preparing cameras and lenses
elements.main_sequence: Light meter readings, softbox positioning, model direction and posing, shutter clicks and flash pops, reviewing shots on camera LCD, creative problem-solving moments, team collaboration
elements.closing: Final hero shot capture, team celebration, behind-the-scenes to final image comparison
elements.atmosphere: Professional creativity, technical precision, collaborative energy

technical_details.lighting: Studio strobes, continuous LED panels, reflectors and flags
technical_details.audio: Shutter clicks, flash recharge, creative direction dialogue, upbeat music

templates.title: Mixed Media Experimentation
templates.description: Exploration of collage, texture, and material exploration combining various artistic mediums

prompt.main: Mixed media art experimentation, multiple materials combining, paint and paper collage, texture building with found objects, unexpected material reactions, vibrant color explosions, macro texture details, 4K high-speed capture, creative chaos atmosphere

elements.opening: Array of diverse materials spread out, artist contemplating combinations, first experimental marks and tears
elements.main_sequence: Layering different mediums, glue and paint interactions, tearing and cutting paper, adding unconventional elements, color bleeding between materials, texture building through layers, happy accidents discovery
elements.closing: Final experimental piece reveal, extreme close-ups of texture complexity, artist's hands touching finished surfaces
elements.atmosphere: Experimental excitement, creative discovery, organized chaos

technical_details.lighting: Bright work light with raking angles for texture
technical_details.audio: Paper tearing, adhesive sounds, material mixing, experimental music

templates.title: Art Gallery Opening
templates.description: Elegant documentation of exhibition atmosphere, artist talks, and viewer reactions

prompt.main: Art gallery opening event, elegant exhibition atmosphere, museum-quality lighting on artworks, floating steadicam movement through spaces, visitor silhouettes against illuminated art, artist giving talk, wine glasses and social interactions, 4K cinematic quality

elements.opening: Exterior gallery establishing shot, elegant entrance with signage, first guests arriving in formal attire
elements.main_sequence: Gliding through gallery spaces, artwork presentations with viewers contemplating, artist explaining work to patrons, champagne toasts, intellectual conversations, close-ups of artwork details with reactions
elements.closing: Crowded gallery energy peak, artist surrounded by admirers, final artwork beauty shots
elements.atmosphere: Sophisticated celebration, artistic appreciation, cultural event

technical_details.lighting: Gallery track lighting, ambient architectural illumination
technical_details.audio: Gallery ambience, conversations, clinking glasses, sophisticated jazz

templates.title: Printmaking Techniques
templates.description: Detailed capture of screen printing, etching, and lithography processes

prompt.main: Printmaking process documentation, screen printing squeegee pulls, ink rolling on plates, paper registration alignment, press operation close-ups, revealing prints from plates, multiple color layer registration, 4K detail capture, workshop atmosphere

elements.opening: Printmaking studio setup, screens and plates preparation, ink mixing and color matching
elements.main_sequence: Screen coating with emulsion, exposure and washout, squeegee pulling ink across screen, etching plate work, rolling brayers with ink, paper positioning, press pressure application, print reveal moments
elements.closing: Edition of prints drying, quality inspection with loupe, artist signing limited editions
elements.atmosphere: Technical precision, artistic craft, repetitive rhythm

technical_details.lighting: Bright workshop lighting, UV exposure unit
technical_details.audio: Squeegee sounds, press operation, paper handling, rhythmic ambient

templates.title: Installation Art Assembly
templates.description: Large-scale construction and space transformation documentation

prompt.main: Large-scale art installation assembly, time-lapse construction sequences, human scale reference for size, dramatic lighting tests and adjustments, space transformation progression, crane and ladder work, 4K cinematic production, architectural integration

elements.opening: Empty installation space, arrival of artwork components on trucks, team briefing and planning
elements.main_sequence: Time-lapse assembly with real-time problem-solving, scale reveals with workers for reference, technical rigging and suspension, lighting design implementation, artist directing placement, safety procedures
elements.closing: Dramatic lighting activation, 360-degree final reveal, first visitors experiencing the space, artist statement
elements.atmosphere: Monumental transformation, collaborative effort, spatial drama

technical_details.lighting: Installation's designed lighting system, work lights
technical_details.audio: Construction sounds, team communication, building orchestral score

templates.title: Creative Workshop Session
templates.description: Immersive capture of teaching moments and student discoveries in artistic learning environment

prompt.main: Creative workshop environment, multiple participants engaged in art-making, instructor demonstrating techniques, warm natural lighting, hands-on learning moments, diverse skill levels working together, breakthrough discoveries, 4K documentary style, collaborative energy

elements.opening: Workshop space coming alive, participants arriving with anticipation, materials and tools being distributed
elements.main_sequence: Instructor demonstration with gathered students, individual creation moments, peer learning exchanges, close-ups of various techniques, problem-solving assistance, messy authentic moments, joyful discoveries
elements.closing: Participants sharing finished works, group critique circle, satisfied expressions and new friendships
elements.atmosphere: Learning excitement, creative community, supportive environment

technical_details.lighting: Natural workshop light with warm practicals
technical_details.audio: Workshop chatter, creative sounds, encouraging words, uplifting music

general_guidelines.composition: Rule of thirds, leading lines, negative space for artistic emphasis
general_guidelines.color_theory: Complementary colors, artistic color harmony, emotional color use
general_guidelines.lighting: Emphasis on texture and form, dramatic shadows when appropriate
general_guidelines.movement: Smooth, intentional camera work that doesn't distract from art
general_guidelines.pacing: Allow viewers time to appreciate details and process
general_guidelines.audio: Layer ambient sounds with musical elements, never overpower visuals
general_guidelines.authenticity: Capture genuine creative moments, avoid over-staging
